@everyone

October Atlas Brew Schedule!

  October Schedule:
 Atlas Brew #82 - SAGE Labs discussion with our Economics team @Chri.z @Wrath (October 4)
 Atlas Brew #83 - SAGE Labs discussion with our Game Design team @Deleted User @Shula (October 11)
 Atlas Brew #84 - What's next for SAGE? (October 18)
 Atlas Brew #85 - Community Updates and Freestyle (October 25)

  What is the Atlas Brew?
The Atlas Brew is a weekly community gathering, where we discuss your favorite Star Atlas topics and have fun! We take notes during the Atlas Brew and give them to the team, so your voice matters!

 Every Wednesday at 1pm ET / 5pm UTC 

The events are live now at the top left of the server, if you'd like to hit the "interested" button to be notified when we're live!

Mentions: @Chri.z, @Wrath, @Deleted User, @Shula
